Back to the game

Cookies and ads

This page explains how the browser may save Brikaya choices and how ads may work.

Last updated: 2026-07-09

Play About Legal Privacy Terms Data deletion Support

Local storage

Brikaya may use browser storage to remember scores, settings, language, consent choices, and offline game files.

This helps the game load faster and work offline after the first load.

Cookies

The core game does not require a player account cookie. Browser or platform features may still use storage needed for security, consent, or ads.

Advertising

If ads are active, they may rely on consent and browser choices. You can review privacy choices in the game menu or browser settings.

Clear choices

Use restore defaults in the game or clear site data for brikaya.com in your browser settings to reset local choices.
